title: Q3 Product Launch Planning
body:
Meeting Minutes - Q3 Product Launch Planning

Date: July 15, 2024
Attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Martinez

Agenda:
1. Venue finalization status
2. Catering options
3. Press and media strategy
4. Workflow update: verification tasks for completed items

Discussion & Decisions:
- Alice confirmed that the venue has been finalized. The task "Finalize venue" is marked as complete on the taskboard.
- The team decided on a catered lunch with a buffet style for 50 guests.
- Bob will handle sending invitations to the press list by Thursday.
- The team agreed to adopt the new verification requirement: for every completed action item, a short verification task must be created to ensure nothing has changed. This is a separate follow-up, not a duplicate.

Action Items:
- Book catering for launch event (assigned to Alice)
- Send invitations to press list (assigned to Bob)
- Finalize venue – COMPLETED (existing task, no new task needed)
- Create verification task 'Verify venue finalization' (assigned to Alice) – this is required per the updated verification procedure, distinct from the original Finalize venue task.
